[]: QUESTION ABOUT THE REBUILD OF EVANGELION SERIES Post by offthechainjoe » Thu Jul 23, 2009 7:40 pm This has probably been asked to death but I can't get a straight answer from anyone.... 1.) Has anyone seen Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0? If so, was it good? 2.) Is there ANYPLACE on the internet I can find and watch this movie? Preferably with subs... 3.) Does anyone know the date in which the movie will be released by Funimation in English? Thanks and sorry if I've wasted your time.
